records.m_Talk_ENG: I just... I just hated myself for being so weak, unable to protect the people that should have been protected.
Yes, everything was for Lady Nanahara, my sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was me that needed change. I was complacent about my role as a guard of Lady Nanahara.

So I would like to plead allegiance to the person I truly want to serve.
